role_summary: the senior accounts manager oversees accounting teams and complex accounting issues  while ensuring compliance an d accuracy.
responsibilities: • lead accounting team and review accounting records   • handle complex accounting transactions   • ensure compliance with accounting standards and laws   • coordinate with auditors and tax consultants   • prepare mis and management reports   • strengthen accounting controls and processes
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong technical accounting and team leadership skills
